sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.61b (beta): The Rescan ET Candidates button is primary (blue) only while a zero-result Extra-Time-candidate row exists — the state the 'Needs Extra Time' note points at. After an Extra-Time rescan yields results, the button stays available (residual candidates may benefit from another pass) but as a secondary action. Carries 1.7.60b (results-table polish) and 1.7.59b (ET-directing noopt copy).
